name: Monday PP prospect list
prompt: Source 10 DTC founders matching PP ICP: ecommerce £500k-£5m revenue, growth-curious, UK or US. Use /skill sales:account-research + /skill cloudflare-crawl on their sites. Save to PP CRM with utm_source=ppaios-pp.

name: Daily PP outreach send
prompt: Send 10 outreach emails via Gmail (caner@purposefulprofits.co for warm referrals, out.purposefulprofits.co for cold once warm). Personalised per prospect. Run guardrail-check (≤50/day). Update PP CRM.

name: Daily reply triage
prompt: Check Gmail for replies to outreach. Classify: positive (book discovery), neutral (nudge in 5 days), negative (closed-lost). Update PP CRM. Draft replies.

name: Wednesday proposal drafts
prompt: For any deal at stage="Demo done", use /skill client-onboarding to generate a tailored proposal + SOW + invoice draft. Save to outputs/proposals/{prospect}-{date}.docx.

name: Sunday pipeline report
prompt: Run /skill sales:pipeline-review and /skill sales:forecast. Export pipeline stages + weighted forecast. iMessage Caner one-line top number.
